productName: M-MT-400BAL - Moxey Balance 3:1 Peppermints (300mg CBG/100mg THC)
description: A refined infused mint made for fresh flavor and low-key convenience, with a confectionery finish that feels more boutique than basic. It blends THC for a classic euphoric lift and CBG to support daytime focus and clarity in a 3:1 ratio. Made to help you relax and find your calm.
